mnemonics: ADAPTIVE BOOSTING: A Dumb Algorithm's Power To Increase Valuable Ensemble Boosting, Overcoming Obstacles Slowly & Tenaciously
STUMPS ARE KEY: Simple Things Usually Make Pretty Effective & Robust Ensembles, Keeping Errors Yielding
keyPoints: Adaboost combines multiple weak learners (typically decision stumps) into a strong ensemble model.
It works by iteratively re-weighting the training data, focusing more on previously misclassified examples.
The final prediction is a weighted majority vote of all the weak learners in the ensemble.
commonMistakes: Using Adaboost with strong learners instead of weak learners (e.g., deep trees), which defeats its purpose.
Confusing Adaboost's data re-weighting mechanism with bootstrapping (sampling) used in algorithms like Random Forest.
